package com.example.service;

        ALLOWED_ORDER_BY_FIELDS.add("username");

        String orderBy = request.getParameter("orderBy");

            }
        }

package com.example.service;

import com.example.mapper.UserMapper;
import com.example.model.User;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.Collections;

/**
 * User service class with enhanced security and validation
 */
public class UserService {
    
    private UserMapper userMapper;
    
    // Allowed sorting fields to prevent SQL injection
    private static final Set<String> ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS = Collections.unmodifiableSet(
        new HashSet<String>() {{
            add("id");
            add("username");
            add("email");
            add("phone");
            add("address");
            add("create_time");
            add("update_time");
            add("status");
        }}
    );
    
    // Valid sort directions
    private static final Set<String> VALID_SORT_DIRECTIONS = Set.of("ASC", "DESC");
    
    public UserService(UserMapper userMapper) {
        this.userMapper = userMapper;
    }
    
    /**
     * Query user list based on sorting field and direction
     * Enhanced with proper input validation and SQL injection prevention
     * 
     * @param orderBy Sorting field
     * @param sortDirection Sorting direction
     * @return User list
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if parameters are invalid
     */
    public List<User> getUsersByOrder(String orderBy, String sortDirection) {
        // Validate and sanitize input parameters
        String validatedOrderBy = validateAndSanitizeOrderBy(orderBy);
        String validatedDirection = validateAndSanitizeSortDirection(sortDirection);
        
        return userMapper.getUsersByOrder(validatedOrderBy, validatedDirection);
    }
    
    /**
     * Validate and sanitize orderBy parameter
     * @param orderBy The sorting field
     * @return Validated orderBy field
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if field is not allowed
     */
    private String validateAndSanitizeOrderBy(String orderBy) {
        if (orderBy == null || orderBy.trim().isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("orderBy parameter cannot be null or empty");
        }
        
        String trimmedOrderBy = orderBy.trim().toLowerCase();
        
        if (!ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS.contains(trimmedOrderBy)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid orderBy field: " + orderBy + 
                ". Allowed fields: " + String.join(", ", ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS));
        }
        
        return trimmedOrderBy;
    }
    
    /**
     * Validate and sanitize sortDirection parameter
     * @param sortDirection The sorting direction
     * @return Validated sort direction (ASC or DESC)
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if direction is invalid
     */
    private String validateAndSanitizeSortDirection(String sortDirection) {
        if (sortDirection == null || sortDirection.trim().isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("sortDirection parameter cannot be null or empty");
        }
        
        String trimmedDirection = sortDirection.trim().toUpperCase();
        
        if (!VALID_SORT_DIRECTIONS.contains(trimmedDirection)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid sortDirection: " + sortDirection + 
                ". Must be 'ASC' or 'DESC' (case-insensitive)");
        }
        
        return trimmedDirection;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get all users
     * @return User list
     */
    public List<User> getAllUsers() {
        return userMapper.getAllUsers();
    }
}

}

    ));

     */

        }
        
        // Normalize and validate sortDirection
        if (sortDirection == null || sortDirection.trim().isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("sortDirection cannot be null or empty");
        }
        String normalizedSortDirection = sortDirection.trim().toUpperCase();
        if (!"ASC".equals(normalizedSortDirection) && !"DESC".equals(normalizedSortDirection)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("sortDirection must be 'ASC' or 'DESC'");
        }
        
        // Normalize and validate orderBy field
        String normalizedOrderBy = orderBy.trim().toLowerCase();
        if (!ALLOWED_ORDER_BY_FIELDS.contains(normalizedOrderBy)) {

        }
        
        return userMapper.getUsersByOrder(normalizedOrderBy, normalizedSortDirection);

    public List<User> getAllUsers() {

        "id", "username", "email", "create_time"

     * @return User list
     */
    public List<User> getUsersByOrder(String orderBy, String sortDirection) {
        // Validate orderBy field exists in allowed set (case-insensitive)
        String exactField = null;
        for (String field : ALLOWED_ORDER_BY_FIELDS) {
            if (field.equalsIgnoreCase(orderBy)) {
                exactField = field;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (exactField == null) {

        }

        // Validate and normalize sortDirection
        String normalizedDirection = sortDirection.toUpperCase();
        if (!"ASC".equals(normalizedDirection) && !"DESC".equals(normalizedDirection)) {

        }

    }
